title: Street
description: Slow walks through cities. The kind of looking that requires standing still for a minute, then another.

images.alt: Five canal-house facades at blue hour with their warm-lit windows reflected in the still water below
images.caption: Damrak, Amsterdam — blue hour

images.alt: A cyclist in a red coat crossing a bridge, framed beneath the stone arch of a closer bridge, in winter fog
images.caption: Reguliersgracht, Amsterdam
